channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [POLYMED] Poly Medicure Ltd Announces One-on-One Meetings with Analysts and Investors
item.description:
Poly Medicure Ltd has announced that it will hold one-on-one meetings with analysts and investors on the 18th of March, 2026. The meetings will be held with Ellerston Capital at 11:00 A.M. The company has clarified that no unpublished price sensitive information will be shared during these meetings. The schedule is subject to changes due to exigencies on the part of the analysts, investors, or the company. The information is also available on the company's website.

  • Poly Medicure Ltd to hold one-on-one meetings with analysts and investors
  • Meetings scheduled for 18th March, 2026
  • Meeting with Ellerston Capital at 11:00 A.M.
  • No unpublished price sensitive information will be shared
  • Schedule subject to changes due to exigencies

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POLY MEDICURE LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [BANDHANBNK] Bandhan Bank Ltd Holds Analysts/Institutional Investors Meet in Singapore
item.description:
Bandhan Bank Ltd, a leading Indian banking institution, recently held an analysts and institutional investors meet in Singapore on March 10, 2026. The event, named 'UBS Emerging India Mid-Caps Corporate Day', was attended by various institutions including Gateway Management Co. Pte. Ltd and Point 72 Asset Management. This meet was held in continuation to a previous letter dated March 05, 2026, and the details have been disclosed as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The disclosure is also available on the bank's website, www.bandhan.bank.in.

  • Bandhan Bank Ltd held an analysts and institutional investors meet in Singapore on March 10, 2026.
  • The event was named 'UBS Emerging India Mid-Caps Corporate Day'.
  • Attendees included Gateway Management Co. Pte. Ltd and Point 72 Asset Management.
  • The meet was held in continuation to a previous letter dated March 05, 2026.
  • The details of the meet have been disclosed as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bandhan Bank Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [KARBON] Karbonsteel Engineering Ltd. Boosts Borrowing Limits to Rs. 300 Crores for Business Expansion
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Karbonsteel Engineering Ltd. approved a proposal to enhance the borrowing limits from Rs. 200 crores to Rs. 300 crores in a meeting on March 09, 2026. This decision aims to support the company's business expansion and funding requirements, pending shareholder approval. The board meeting started at 3.00 p.m. and concluded at 4.03 p.m.

  • Karbonsteel Engineering Ltd. seeks to increase borrowing limits from Rs. 200 crores to Rs. 300 crores
  • The enhancement is subject to shareholder approval
  • The increased borrowing limits aim to facilitate business expansion
  • The decision supports the company's funding requirements
  • The board meeting took place on March 09, 2026, from 3.00 p.m. to 4.03 p.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Karbonsteel Engineering Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [TIRUSTA] Tirupati Starch & Chemicals Ltd Submits Report on Re-lodgement of Transfer Requests of Physical Shares for February 2026
item.description:
Tirupati Starch & Chemicals Ltd has submitted a report on the re-lodgement of transfer requests of physical shares for the month of February 2026. This submission is in reference to the SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD/P/CIR/2025/97 dtd. July 02, 2025 and Circular No. HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/1/3750/2026 dtd. January 30, 2026. The report, titled 'Annexure-A', details no requests received, processed, approved, or rejected for the month, with all requests being digitally signed.

  • Tirupati Starch & Chemicals Ltd submits report on re-lodgement of transfer requests of physical shares for February 2026.
  • No physical share transfer requests were received, processed, approved, or rejected for the month.
  • Submission is in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD/P/CIR/2025/97 and Circular No. HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/1/3750/2026.
  • All requests were digitally signed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TIRUPATI STARCH & CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [THOMASCOOK] Thomas Cook India and SOTC Travel Partner with Booking.com to Enhance Corporate Business Travel Experience
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Thomas Cook (India) Limited and its group company SOTC Travel have announced a strategic partnership with Booking.com to deliver comprehensive and enhanced accommodation solutions for Indian corporates. The focus is on consumer-level breadth with corporate-level controls, transparent pricing and India-specific servicing. Booking.com’s accommodation content is live on Thomas Cook India and SOTC’s corporate booking tool, giving business clients immediate access to a vast network of over 31 million reported listings across 220+ countries and territories, including India. This collaboration offers an unparalleled selection ranging from world-class hotels and resorts to homes and apartments, all supported by seamless integration into enterprise travel approval systems, enterprise-specific rates, loyalty benefits, and easy, real-time, on-the-go access through digital applications. The program addresses the top requests of India’s business travel and procurement heads: wider choice while staying within company travel policies, invoice integrity with GST compliance, safer stays for diverse traveller profiles, and service support that goes beyond standard online booking platforms.

  • Strategic partnership between Thomas Cook India, SOTC Travel and Booking.com
  • Expanded accommodation solutions for Indian corporates
  • Access to over 31 million reported listings across 220+ countries and territories
  • Seamless integration into enterprise travel approval systems
  • Compliance with GST and safer stays for diverse traveller profiles

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THOMAS COOK (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [SILVERLINE] Silverline Technologies Ltd Changes Company Website Address
item.description:
Silverline Technologies Limited has announced a change in its website address. The new website is https://silverlinetechnologies.in/. The company has requested all stakeholders and the listing portal to update the records accordingly.

  • Silverline Technologies Limited has changed its website address.
  • The new website address is https://silverlinetechnologies.in/.
  • The company has requested all stakeholders to update the records.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SILVERLINE TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PPARIVAH] Paradeep Parivahan Ltd Receives In-Principle Approval for Preferential Issue of Convertible Warrants
item.description:
Paradeep Parivahan Ltd has received in-principle approval from BSE Limited for the preferential issue of 10,40,000 (Ten Lakhs Forty Thousand) convertible warrants. The warrants will be issued to promoters and non-promoters at an issue price of Rs. 156.46/- (Rupees One hundred fifty-six and forty-six paise only) per equity share. The approval is valid for 15 days from the approval date.

  • Paradeep Parivahan Ltd has received in-principle approval for the preferential issue of convertible warrants.
  • The warrants will be issued to promoters and non-promoters at an issue price of Rs. 156.46/- per equity share.
  • The approval is valid for 15 days from the approval date.
  • The company is required to comply with the provisions of various acts and regulations for the issue and allotment of securities.
  • The company is advised to strengthen internal controls and obtain an undertaking from the allottee(s) to avoid any non-compliances.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paradeep Parivahan Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [INTERARCH] Interarch Building Solutions Secures Rs.44 Crores Order from Undisclosed Customer
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Interarch Building Solutions Ltd. has announced that it has secured an order from a customer, with the purchase order received and details enclosed as Annexure A. The order involves Design, Engineering, Manufacturing, Supply & erection of Pre-Engineered Steel Building System, with a completion period of 7 months and a value of approximately Rs.44 Crores Plus Tax. The customer's name cannot be disclosed due to confidentiality and commercial considerations.

  • Interarch Building Solutions has secured a new order from a customer.
  • The order involves Design, Engineering, Manufacturing, Supply & erection of Pre-Engineered Steel Building System.
  • The order has a value of approximately Rs.44 Crores Plus Tax.
  • The completion period for the order is 7 months.
  • The customer's name cannot be disclosed due to confidentiality and commercial considerations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Interarch Building Products Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [WSFX] WSFx Global Pay Ltd Opens New Branch Offices in Hinjewadi and Thane
item.description:
🔥 Trending

WSFx Global Pay Ltd has announced the opening of its new branch offices in Hinjewadi and Thane, as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The Hinjewadi branch is located at Office No.208, Upper Ground Floor, Gera Infotech park, Hinjawadi Phase-2, Mulshi, Pune-411057, and the Thane branch is at Unit No.1, Kusurnanjali, Mauje Naupada, Gokhale Road, Thane - 400602.

  • WSFx Global Pay Ltd opens new branch offices in Hinjewadi and Thane
  • Locations: Office No.208, Upper Ground Floor, Gera Infotech park, Hinjawadi Phase-2, Mulshi, Pune-411057 (Hinjewadi), and Unit No.1, Kusurnanjali, Mauje Naupada, Gokhale Road, Thane - 400602 (Thane)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WSFx Global Pay Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SUNITATOOL] Sunita Tools Limited Enters Strategic MOU with USA Based Company for Bidding/Facilitating Upcoming Defence Tenders
item.description:
Sunita Tools Limited has entered into a strategic Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with a USA based company to facilitate and support in Bidding/ paperwork and formalities execution of an upcoming Tenders and Contracts for various caliber shells especially 155 M107 defence orders. The MOU aims to ensure smooth execution, compliance with local laws and regulations, operational efficiency, and timely completion of the proposed order, while strengthening Sunita Tools Limited’s footprint in the North American markets.

  • Facilitation of all local regulatory, administrative, and statutory formalities in the USA
  • Coordination with Government authorities, customers, and stakeholders
  • Support in execution, logistics, and on-ground operational requirements
  • Commercial participation, Bidding and Liaisons with defense companies in USA

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sunita Tools Ltd | Category: MoU
